title: Edit possibilities for chart layout, incl. legend

posts.author: Philipp_Nies (Philipp Nies)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I feel that the capabilities of changing the layout of charts is very limited (or even non-existing).
Is there a way to change the color code of the legend, re-positioning the legend (e.g., overlaying on the chart), etc.?

Thanks,
Philipp

image1844×866 60.1 KB

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @Philipp_Nies !

Unfortunately that is not a feature for monday.com at the moment.

posts.author: Philipp_Nies (Philipp Nies)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for your feedback.

I would suggest to then rework the “dark mode” to take this lack of visibility into account.
